helper_landscape_summary: Retrieved: LLM-Sieve (task-specific weight pruning), GBLM-Pruner (gradient threshold), SafeSieve (progressive multi-agent), OrthoRank (orthogonality token select). No truncated-inclusion-exclusion sieve formula.
